# Location

The event will be held at The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH.

::: {style="width: 100%; height: 350px; margin-top: 1rem;"}
<iframe width="100%" height="350" frameborder="0" style="border:1px solid #aaa; border-radius:12px;" src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=The+Ohio+State+University,+Columbus,+OH&amp;output=embed" allowfullscreen>

</iframe>

<br/>
:::

# Accommodation

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

# Travel information

## By air

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

## By train

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco.

## By local transit

Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit.

## Around the venue

| Category    | Placeholder recommendation |
|-------------|----------------------------|
| Hotel       | Lorem Ipsum Suites         |
| Café        | Dolor Sit Coffee           |
| Dinner      | Amet Kitchen               |
| Walkability | 10 minutes to venue        |
